---
date: "Date: `r Sys.Date()`"
output:
    html_document:
        toc: true
        toc_depth: 3
        toc_float: true
        theme: cerulean
geometry: margin = 2cm
---

# Results of CAGEr analysis

```{r eval=TRUE, include=TRUE}
results_dir <- "../../results/cager"
```

### Tag region annotation
```{r eval=TRUE, include=TRUE}
tagannot_plot <- readRDS(
    file.path(results_dir, "tag_region_annotation_plot.rds"))
print(tagannot_plot)
```

### Correlation
```{r eval=TRUE, include=TRUE}
hm_plot <- readRDS(
    file.path(results_dir, "correlations_heatmap_plot.rds"))
print(hm_plot)
```

### TSS logo
```{r eval=TRUE, include=TRUE}
tss_plot <- readRDS(
    file.path(results_dir, "TSSlogos_plot.rds"))
print(tss_plot)
```

### Normalization
```{r eval=TRUE, include=TRUE}
revc_plot <- readRDS(
    file.path(results_dir, "reverse_cumulative_plot.rds"))
print(revc_plot)
```

### Promoter width
```{r eval=TRUE, include=TRUE}
iqw_plot <- readRDS(
    file.path(results_dir, "interquartile_width_tagclusters_plot.rds"))
print(iqw_plot)
```

### Tagcluster annotation
```{r eval=TRUE, include=TRUE}
chta_plot <- readRDS(
    file.path(results_dir, "chipseeker_tagCluster_annotation_plot.rds"))
print(chta_plot)
```

### Nucleotide and dinucleotide frequencies in tagclusters
```{r eval=TRUE, include=TRUE}
nucl_plot <- readRDS(
    file.path(results_dir, "nucleotide_frequencies_plot.rds"))
print(nucl_plot)

dinucl_plot <- readRDS(
    file.path(results_dir, "dinucleotide_frequencies_plot.rds"))
print(dinucl_plot)
```
